title: Cryptoheros panamensis

description: Cr. panamensis:  FMNH 7601 (holotype), Panama, Canal Zone, Río Mandinga at “Bas Obispo”; FMNH 8112 (1), Panama, Gorgona; NRM 13097 (3), Panama, Río Ipetí; NRM 37100 (4), Panama, Río Mandinga; UMMZ 170964 (3, XR, dig.), Panama, road to Madden Dam, a tributary of Lake Gatún.
